title: PM shuts down Parliament until March
notes: CBC News report on Harper's request to prorogue Parliament on December 30, 2009. Parliament was prorogued until March 3, 2010. Note: EVT-002's event_date of 2010-01-13 was set during original data entry — the prorogation itself occurred December 30, 2009; January 2010 is when the controversy and protests peaked.
